summary: All 12 months of 2025 CPIH data published. Annual index values: 2024=132.9, 2025=138.0, giving annual rate of 3.84%. Monthly average of 12-month rates = 3.88%.
content: Monthly CPIH 12-month rates for 2025: Jan 3.9, Feb 3.7, Mar 3.4, Apr 4.1, May 4.0, Jun 4.1, Jul 4.2, Aug 4.1, Sep 4.1, Oct 3.8, Nov 3.5, Dec 3.6. Simple average = 3.88%. ONS annual CPIH index: 2024=132.9, 2025=138.0. Index-based annual rate = (138.0/132.9-1)*100 = 3.84%. Resolution should be approximately 3.84-3.88% depending on exact ONS methodology.
